title: Jankok

'''Jankok''' was a [[Temperature/Legends|warm]]<ref name="CSWE" /> terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="AlienEncounters" /> located in the [[Jankok system/Legends|Jankok system]], a part of the [[Bozhnee sector/Legends|Bozhnee sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Jankok was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Feline/Legends|feline]] [[Srrors'tok]] [[Species/Legends|species]], members of which communicated via the [[Hras'kkk'rarr]] [[Language/Legends|language]] and were susceptible to low temperatures. The Srrors'tok primarily lived in tribal [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]] parties formed on the basis of familial ties and a common culture, and their homeworld was at a primitive [[technology level]].<ref name="AlienEncounters" />

Few offworlders, save for [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] and the occasional [[Merchant/Legends|trader]], visited Jankok, and the planet had no [[Spaceport/Legends|starports]]. Not many Srrors'tok left their homeworld,<ref name="AlienEncounters" /> with [[Ahnjai Rahmma]], [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] and enforcer of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[High Inquisitor]] [[Antinnis Tremayne]],<ref name="GG9">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref> and the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Tyionsis Cex]] and his merchant family being among those who did.<ref name="GG10">''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Jankok was first mentioned in the [[1998]] [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Alien Encounters]]''.<ref name="AlienEncounters" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Jankok [[Star system/Legends|system]], and thereby the planet itself, in grid square L-18.<ref name="TEA" />
